properties.name: spring.jpa.hibernate.globally_quoted_identifiers
properties.description: Whether to use quoted identifiers in the generated SQL.

properties.name: exchange.rate.api.key
properties.description: API Key for the exchange rate service.

properties.name: exchange.rate.api.url
properties.description: Base URL for the exchange rate API.

properties.name: exchange.rate.update.cron
properties.description: Cron expression for scheduled rate updates.

properties.name: spring.flyway.baseline-on-migrate
properties.description: Whether to automatically baseline when a non-empty schema is found.

properties.name: spring.thymeleaf.servlet.max-chunk-size
properties.description: Maximum size in bytes of each chunk in the response buffer.
